app.name: PaieCI
db.notConfiguredHelp: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to connect your Supabase database, or launch the demo (local sandbox).
db.notReadyHelp: The database is reachable but the tables are missing. Run supabase/setup.sql in the Supabase SQL editor, then retry.

bulletins.title: Payslip generation
bulletins.downloaded: Payslips downloaded (file “bulletins-paie.html”). Open it, then print or save as PDF (Ctrl/⌘ + P). Direct printing may be blocked in the demo preview; it works on the deployed app.
bulletins.printFailed: Printing and download were blocked by the environment. Use the deployed app (your domain) to generate the PDFs.
settings.title: Settings
settings.localMode: Administrator workspace — data stored locally on this device (persistent, no time limit). For a centralised multi-device database, configure Supabase (see supabase/setup.sql).
